calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-09-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name. (of a minor)
Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/V.Mack, CSR: Rhonda Fung.
Petitioner Eileen Terese Riendeau present in pro per, was sworn and examined.
The Court grants the petition for change of name to: Nellie riendeau Lazar.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Nov-18-2003 Off Calendar
